scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n xray,backend,frontend -c magenta,blue,green "npm run dev:xray" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
